mapper.sql: ka.id, ka.year, ka.examine_status, ka.attribute1, ka.attribute2, ka.attribute3, ka.attribute4, ka.attribute5, ka.create_time, ka.create_by, ka.update_time, ka.update_by

${tAlias}.id as ${tAlias}_id, ${tAlias}.year as ${tAlias}_year, ${tAlias}.examine_status as ${tAlias}_examine_status, ${tAlias}.attribute1 as ${tAlias}_attribute1, ${tAlias}.attribute2 as ${tAlias}_attribute2, ${tAlias}.attribute3 as ${tAlias}_attribute3, ${tAlias}.attribute4 as ${tAlias}_attribute4, ${tAlias}.attribute5 as ${tAlias}_attribute5, ${tAlias}.create_time as ${tAlias}_create_time, ${tAlias}.create_by as ${tAlias}_create_by, ${tAlias}.update_time as ${tAlias}_update_time, ${tAlias}.update_by as ${tAlias}_update_by
mapper.insert: insert into kpi_annual (year, examine_status, attribute1, attribute2, attribute3, attribute4, attribute5, create_time, create_by, update_time, update_by) values (#{year,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{examineStatus,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{attribute1,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{attribute2,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{attribute3,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{attribute4,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{attribute5,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{createBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT})
mapper.update: update kpi_annual set year = #{year,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, examine_status = #{examineStatus,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute1 = #{attribute1,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute2 = #{attribute2,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute3 = #{attribute3,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute4 = #{attribute4,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute5 = #{attribute5,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_by = #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM kpi_annual WHERE examine_status <> '终稿定稿'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM kpi_annual WHERE examine_status <> '终稿定稿' AND examine_status <> '数据初始化' AND YEAR = #{criteria.year,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
